headline: Wolfe Research upgrades AvalonBay, Equity Residential on merger synergy and value
summary: Investing.com -- Wolfe Research upgraded apartment REITs AvalonBay Communities and Equity Residential to Outperform from Peer Perform, arguing that expected merger synergies and attractive valuations outweigh a still-challenging but stabilizing operating environment.
